title: Developing an Agent for Personalized Product Recommendations
scenario: Design a conversational agent that provides personalized product recommendations to customers based on their purchase history, browsing behavior, and search queries. The target LLM output should be a detailed specification document outlining the agent's capabilities, data sources, and potential UI elements. Ensure the document is 2-3 pages in length and includes relevant technical details.
constraints: Must use a specific programming framework
Should include a minimum of 3 data sources
Should include a diagram of the system architecture

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the specification document accurately outline the agent's technical requirements?
Are the included data sources relevant to the recommendation use case?
Are the included UI elements relevant to a conversational interface?
Is the system architecture diagram clear and easy to understand?
